purpose: Generated charts must use locally verifiable Sanofi Data Visualization tokens and contracts. Pending Zeroheight content must not be invented.

categorical.allowed_when: Use for unrelated named categories or series.

sequential.allowed_when: Use for ordered magnitude or intensity.

diverging.allowed_when: Use only when the chart has an explicit midpoint, baseline, or two-sided comparison.

forbidden_patterns: raw hex, rgb, hsl, oklch, or named chart colors in generated page CSS
green as default primary chart color without explicit success/status or labeled series meaning
data-primitive="chart" used as proof of an official chart component
unsupported chart type without data-fallback-module="chart" and data-fallback-reason
